plugin.name: Code Snippets
plugin.description: WPCode-style snippet injection for adding arbitrary HTML/JS before </head>, after <body>, and before </body>; useful for Google Analytics, GTM, verification meta tags, and third-party tracking scripts.
plugin.settings.title: %s - Plugin Settings
plugin.settings.warning: Injected code is output as-is and is not escaped. Use trusted sources only.
plugin.codesnippets.ui.001: Inject arbitrary HTML / JavaScript snippets into three standard locations without modifying theme files. Typical uses:
plugin.codesnippets.ui.004: Leave a field empty to skip that injection point. Changes apply to all pages after saving, and page cache will be cleared.
plugin.codesnippets.ui.006: Inserted before </head>. Useful for verification meta tags, third-party CSS, preconnect, Google Analytics gtag.js, and GTM scripts.
plugin.codesnippets.ui.008: Inserted immediately after <body>. Useful for GTM noscript iframes, A/B test bootstraps, and visible site-wide announcement bars.
plugin.codesnippets.ui.010: Inserted before </body>, after theme scripts. Useful for deferred chat widgets, third-party tracking, and heatmaps such as Hotjar or Microsoft Clarity.
